qry:select.name: sql1
qry:select.qry:xquery: for $r in SQL(' select PRO2.c_process, PRO2.d_process from WRK01_PROCESS as PRO1, WRK01_PROCESS as PRO2 join PRO1.oi_wf inner PRO2.oi_wf where PRO2.e_automatico=0 AND PRO1.oi_process = {#SOURCE:@PARENT} AND PRO2.oi_process != {#SOURCE:@PARENT} ')/ROWS/ROW

qry:select.name: sql1
qry:select.qry:xquery: for $r in SQL(' select WRK01_WF.c_wf, WRK01_WF.d_wf from WRK01_WF where WRK01_WF.l_automatica=0 ')/ROWS/ROW

qry:select.name: sql1
qry:select.qry:xquery: for $r in SQL(' select WRK01_ESTADOS.c_estado, WRK01_ESTADOS.d_estado from WRK01_ESTADOS, WRK01_PROCESS join WRK01_PROCESS.oi_wf INNER WRK01_ESTADOS.oi_wf where WRK01_PROCESS.oi_process = {#SOURCE:@PARENT} ')/ROWS/ROW

qry:select.name: sql1
qry:select.qry:xquery: for $r in SQL(' select WRK01_NODE_TEXTS.c_text from WRK01_NODE_TEXTS, WRK01_PROCESS join WRK01_PROCESS.oi_wf INNER WRK01_NODE_TEXTS.oi_wf where WRK01_PROCESS.oi_process = {#SOURCE:@PARENT} ')/ROWS/ROW

qry:select.name: sql1
qry:select.qry:xquery: for $r in SQL(' select WRK01_FORMS.c_form, WRK01_FORMS.d_form from WRK01_FORMS, WRK01_PROCESS join WRK01_PROCESS.oi_wf INNER WRK01_FORMS.oi_wf where WRK01_PROCESS.oi_process = {#SOURCE:@PARENT} ')/ROWS/ROW

qry:select.name: sql1
qry:select.qry:xquery: for $r in SQL(' select WRK04_INT_MAN.c_int_mag, WRK04_INT_MAN.d_int_mag from WRK04_INT_MAN where WRK04_INT_MAN.c_type={#SOURCE:@MODE} ')/ROWS/ROW

qry:define.declare: <NODE descr="Nuevo" nmd-status="~i,n_secuence,c_type,d_label,d_param_1,d_param_2," n_secuence="12582912" c_type="XQUERY" d_label="Llamar al query TEST 9" d_param_1="TEST 9" d_param_2="CHILD"> <NODE_PARAMS nmd-col="1" /> <ROLES_NODE nmd-col="1" /> </NODE>
qry:define.name: PARAMS_IN

qry:select.name: sql1
qry:select.qry:xquery: for $r in SQL(' select PAR.oi_param, PAR.c_param, PAR.c_type, PAR.c_io from WRK04_PARAMS as PAR, WRK04_INT_MAN as INT join INT.oi_int_mag INNER PAR.oi_int_mag where INT.c_int_mag = {#SOURCE:@d_param_1} AND isNull(PAR.oi_param_x) AND PAR.c_io = \'IN\' ')/ROWS/ROW

qry:select.name: sql2
qry:select.qry:xquery: for $r in SQL(' select NODE.o_formula, NODE.c_var from WRK01_NODE_PARAMS as NODE where NODE.c_param = {#SOURCE:@c_param} AND NODE.oi_node = {#APPEND:@id} ')/ROWS/ROW

qry:define.declare: <NODE descr=" - [309] Llamar al método TEST 6" d_param_2="RETURN" d_param_1="TEST 6" d_label="Llamar al método TEST 6" n_secuence="2154496" c_type="METHOD" oi_process="3" id="309" nmd-status="~u,d_param_2,"> <oi_role nmd-agr="1" /> <NODE_PARAMS nmd-col="1"> <PARAM descr=" - [309] Llamar al método TEST 6 - [P1] " o_formula="aa" c_type="double" c_param="P1" oi_node="309" id="304" /> <PARAM descr=" - [309] Llamar al método TEST 6 - [P4] " o_formula="sss" c_type="NomadXML" c_param="P4" oi_node="309" id="305" /> <PARAM descr=" - [309] Llamar al método TEST 6 - [P3] " c_var="dddd" c_type="string" c_param="P3" oi_node="309" id="306" /> </NODE_PARAMS> </NODE>
qry:define.name: PARAMS_OUT

qry:select.name: sql1
qry:select.qry:xquery: for $r in SQL(' select PAR.oi_param, PAR.c_param, PAR.c_type, PAR.c_io from WRK04_PARAMS as PAR, WRK04_INT_MAN as INT join INT.oi_int_mag INNER PAR.oi_int_mag where INT.c_int_mag = {#SOURCE:@d_param_1} AND PAR.c_io = \'IO\' ')/ROWS/ROW

qry:select.name: sql2
qry:select.qry:xquery: for $r in SQL(' select NODE.o_formula, NODE.c_var from WRK01_NODE_PARAMS as NODE where NODE.c_param = {#SOURCE:@c_param} AND NODE.oi_node = {#APPEND:@id} ')/ROWS/ROW

qry:select.name: sql1
qry:select.qry:xquery: for $r in SQL(' select WRK01_VARS.oi_var, WRK01_VARS.c_var, WRK01_VARS.d_var, WRK01_VARS.c_type from WRK01_GROUPS, WRK01_VARS, WRK01_PROCESS join WRK01_PROCESS.oi_wf INNER WRK01_GROUPS.oi_wf, WRK01_GROUPS.oi_var_group INNER WRK01_VARS.oi_var_group where WRK01_PROCESS.oi_process = {#SOURCE:@PARENT} AND WRK01_GROUPS.c_var_group = {#SOURCE:@d_param_2} ')/ROWS/ROW

qry:select.name: sql2
qry:select.qry:xquery: for $r in SQL(' select NODE.o_formula, NODE.c_var from WRK01_NODE_PARAMS as NODE where NODE.c_param = {#SOURCE:@c_param} AND NODE.oi_node = {#APPEND:@id} ')/ROWS/ROW

qry:select.name: sql1
qry:select.qry:xquery: for $r in SQL(' select ROLES.oi_role, ROLES.c_role, ROLES.d_role from WRK05_ROLES as ROLES, WRK05_ORGANIGRAMAS as ORG, WRK01_WF as WF, WRK01_PROCESS as PRO join PRO.oi_wf INNER WF.oi_wf, WF.oi_organigrama INNER ORG.oi_organigrama, ORG.oi_organigrama INNER ROLES.oi_organigrama where PRO.oi_process = {#SOURCE:@PARENT} ')/ROWS/ROW

qry:select.name: sql2
qry:select.qry:xquery: for $r in SQL(' select ROL.oi_role_node, ROL.c_notificar, ROL.c_resolver, ROL.d_rol_delega, ROL.c_puede_deleg from WRK01_PROCESS as PRO, WRK01_NODES as NOD, WRK01_ROLES_NODE as ROL join PRO.oi_process INNER NOD.oi_process, NOD.oi_node INNER ROL.oi_node where NOD.oi_node = {#SOURCE:@ID_NODE} AND ROL.c_rol = {#SOURCE:@cod} ')/ROWS/ROW

qry:select.name: sql1
qry:select.qry:xquery: for $r in SQL(' select WRK01_GROUPS.c_var_group, WRK01_GROUPS.d_var_group from WRK01_GROUPS, WRK01_PROCESS join WRK01_PROCESS.oi_wf INNER WRK01_GROUPS.oi_wf where WRK01_PROCESS.oi_process={#SOURCE:@PARENT} AND WRK01_GROUPS.c_mode IN (\'CHILD\', \'ARRAUX\') ')/ROWS/ROW

qry:select.name: sql1
qry:select.qry:xquery: for $r in SQL(' select WRK01_NODES.c_type, WRK01_PROCESS.oi_process, WRK01_PROCESS.c_process, WRK01_PROCESS.oi_wf from WRK01_NODES, WRK01_PROCESS join WRK01_NODES.oi_process INNER WRK01_PROCESS.oi_process where WRK01_NODES.oi_node={#SOURCE:@PARENT} ')/ROWS/ROW

qry:select.name: sql2
qry:select.qry:xquery: for $r in SQL(' select MAX(WRK01_NODE_PARAMS.e_orden) as e_orden from WRK01_NODE_PARAMS where WRK01_NODE_PARAMS.oi_node={#SOURCE:@PARENT} ')/ROWS/ROW

qry:select.name: sql3
qry:select.qry:xquery: for $r in SQL(' select MAX(PRO2.e_automatico) as e_automatico from WRK01_PROCESS as PRO1, WRK01_PROCESS as PRO2 join PRO1.oi_wf INNER PRO2.oi_wf where PRO1.oi_process={#SOURCE:@oi_process} ')/ROWS/ROW

qry:select.name: sql4
qry:select.qry:xquery: for $r in SQL(' select WRK01_NODE_PARAMS.oi_param from WRK01_NODES, WRK01_NODE_PARAMS join WRK01_NODES.oi_node INNER WRK01_NODE_PARAMS.oi_node where WRK01_NODE_PARAMS.e_subproceso={#SOURCE:@ID} AND WRK01_NODES.oi_node={#SOURCE:@PARENT} ')/ROWS/ROW

qry:define.declare: <ROWS d_param=""> <ROW destinatario="Envío al Rol: OWNER" id="1" /> </ROWS>
qry:define.name: qryDestinatarios

qry:select.name: sql1
qry:select.qry:xquery: for $r in #SOURCE:ROW

qry:select.name: sql1
qry:select.qry:xquery: for $r in SQL(' select ROLES.oi_role, ROLES.c_role, ROLES.d_role from WRK05_ROLES as ROLES, WRK05_ORGANIGRAMAS as ORG, WRK01_WF as WF, WRK01_PROCESS as PRO join PRO.oi_wf INNER WF.oi_wf, WF.oi_organigrama INNER ORG.oi_organigrama, ORG.oi_organigrama INNER ROLES.oi_organigrama where PRO.oi_process = {#SOURCE:@PARENT} ')/ROWS/ROW

qry:select.name: sql1
qry:select.qry:xquery: for $r in SQL(' select WRK01_NODE_PARAMS.oi_node, WRK01_NODE_PARAMS.oi_param, WRK01_NODE_PARAMS.c_type, WRK01_NODE_PARAMS.c_param, WRK01_NODE_PARAMS.d_param, WRK01_NODE_PARAMS.o_formula, WRK01_NODE_PARAMS.d_valor from WRK01_NODE_PARAMS where WRK01_NODE_PARAMS.oi_node = {#SOURCE:@ID} ')/ROWS/ROW

qry:select.name: sql1
qry:select.qry:xquery: for $r in SQL(' select PRO1.c_process, PRO1.d_process from WRK01_PROCESS as PRO1, WRK01_WF as WF join wf.oi_wf INNER PRO1.oi_wf where PRO1.e_automatico=0 AND WF.l_automatica = 0 AND WF.c_wf = {#SOURCE:@d_param_1} ')/ROWS/ROW

doc:set-attribute.from-value: Crear nodo Llamar un Store Procedure
Modificar nodo Llamar un Store Procedure
Crear nodo ir a la Etiqueta
Modificar nodo ir a la Etiqueta
Crear Nodo Cambio en la Fecha de Vencimiento
Modificar Nodo Cambio en la Fecha de Vencimiento
